theme: Why your best employees are quietly updating their LinkedIn

linkedin.text:
Your best engineer just updated their LinkedIn headline. That's not a coincidence.

It's never the loud ones. It's the quiet performers who deliver for years and never ask for more. The research is consistent: top talent leaves before it complains — a few quiet calls, then a letter on your desk.

After 16 years running incentive programs across Israel and Europe, here's what actually retains them:

Not salary — that buys two years.
Not promotions — those satisfy ambition, not loyalty.

What keeps top performers is feeling seen. Publicly. In front of their peers. With something money didn't just buy, but that was designed for them — their name called in front of 60 colleagues, the CEO explaining exactly why their work mattered.

The companies we work with that run annual incentive programs see 9% voluntary turnover in that cohort. Industry average for similar roles: 22%.

The numbers speak for themselves.

📅 Book a free 30-minute call and we'll design a 2026 program that makes your top people stay.

#EmployeeEngagement #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
A client once told me her best project manager handed in her notice on a Tuesday morning. No warning. No complaints. She'd been quietly updating her LinkedIn for months. 💭

That's the thing about top performers — they don't slam doors. They just leave.

After 16 years running incentive programs for Israeli and European companies, here's what I've learned actually keeps them:

It's not salary. Salary gets them through the door and keeps them about two years.

It's not promotions. Those feed ambition, not loyalty.

What keeps them is feeling genuinely seen — their name called in front of 60 colleagues, the CEO saying out loud why their work mattered. Money can't fake that.

The companies we work with that do this well see 9% voluntary turnover. The industry average is 22%.

What's kept your best people around? Tell us in the comments. 💬

#EmployeeEngagement #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Leadership
